_comment: Explicit model_id -> contract overrides, checked before Mantle's /v1/models response and before the anthropic./non-anthropic. prefix heuristic. Value is either a bare string ("anthropic" or "openai") or, for OpenAI-contract models Mantle only serves on the '/openai/v1/...' path instead of the standard '/v1/...' path, an object {"contract": "openai", "openai_path_prefix": true}. See README 'How the target contract is resolved'.
